title: Pinout
description: Array of Pin objects describing every pin on a package. Referenced from base.schema.json under base.pinout.
x-stability-note: Pin schema is additive-only-calibrating through v1.4. Real-corpus extractions may prompt shape refinements before v1.5 commits to strict additive-only discipline.

name.description: Alternate function name as listed in the datasheet (e.g. 'USART1_TX', 'SPI2_MISO').

peripheral.description: Peripheral family this alt function belongs to (e.g. 'USART1', 'SPI2', 'TIM3'). Detectors filter by this.

role.description: Role within the peripheral when meaningful (e.g. 'TX', 'MISO', 'CH1N'). null for peripherals without a role subdivision.

af_code.description: Datasheet-specific alternate-function selector code (e.g. STM32 'AF7', Renesas 'PSEL=01'). Opaque to detectors.

numbers.description: Pin number(s). Always a list even for single-pin records. Strings to support BGA grids ('A1'), LGA, and stacked internal pins (['3','4','5']).

name.description: Primary pin name as printed in the datasheet pinout table (e.g. 'PA9', 'VIN', 'SW').

type.description: Electrical role. Vocabulary mirrors KiCad's ERC pin-type matrix so detectors can cross-reference symbol pin types.

subtype.description: Free-form refinement of 'type' when relevant (e.g. 'open_drain' on a bidirectional pin). null when unspecified.

description.description: Human-readable pin description (e.g. 'GPIO Port A bit 9', 'Inverting input').

power_domain.description: Power-supply rail key. Must resolve to a base.recommended_operating entry. null for pins outside any power domain (NC, GND reference).

alt_functions.description: Alternate-function table for muxed pins. Empty for fixed-function pins.

is_5v_tolerant.description: True iff datasheet explicitly rates the pin for 5V signals. null when unspecified (do NOT assume — detectors treat null as unknown).

absolute_max.description: Per-pin absolute-maximum ratings (voltage, current). null when the datasheet only publishes module-level absolute max.

notes.description: Free-form cross-pin constraints or usage notes (e.g. 'tie to VIN via 10–100kΩ if not driven'). Structured relationships live in base.pin_relationships instead.

page.description: PDF page number (1-based) where the pin entry was sourced.

section.description: Datasheet section label (e.g. 'Pin Configuration and Functions') when available.

confidence.description: Extractor confidence in this pin entry. Pivots consumer trust gating.

method.description: How the pin entry was captured. 'table' = pinout table. 'prose' = narrative text. 'curve' = pinout diagram. 'calculated' / 'derived' = inferred from other datasheet facts.

evidence.description: Provenance for this pin entry. null only for derived/internal entries.
